backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a greeting storage system with functions to create, retrieve, and list birthday greetings indexed by linkId, using a Map to store Greeting records containing recipientName and message.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of dynamically styled candles in the BirthdayCake component that harmonize with the cake decoration theme, referencing frontend/src/components/BirthdayCake.tsx and frontend/src/index.css.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the birthday greeting app's architecture, including routing, backend queries, blow detection, sender/recipient pages, cake/message components, and styling with festive candle-themed color variables.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining design tokens for background, foreground, primary, secondary, and other UI elements using neutral grayscale values.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Birthday Greeting App with root div and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining root route with Outlet and Toaster, plus routes for sender form (/) and recipient view (/greeting/:linkId).
frontend/src/components/BirthdayCake.tsx: Birthday cake component rendering a cake image with three dynamically styled candles featuring festive gradients, decorative stripes, wax drips, and animated flames that transition between lit and extinguished states based on isLit prop.
Birthday message display component showing personalized greeting with recipient name and message, featuring confetti animation, party icons, and celebratory styling with gradient background.
frontend/src/components/ConfettiAnimatio: Confetti animation component generating 50 falling confetti pieces with randomized positions, delays, durations, and rotations for celebratory visual effect.
frontend/src/components/LinkDisplay.tsx: Component displaying the generated shareable birthday link with copy-to-clipboard functionality, sharing instructions, and option to create another greeting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing ICP backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, returning authenticated or anonymous actor and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlowDetection.ts: Custom React hook that uses Web Audio API to detect blowing sounds through the microphone by analyzing low-mid frequency amplitudes (10-100 Hz range) and triggers a state change when sustained amplitude exceeds threshold.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options for idle handling and derivation origins.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for greeting operations: useCreateGreeting mutation to create greetings with linkId/recipient/message, and useGetGreeting query to fetch greeting data by linkId.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a festive warm color palette (party/candle/flame colors) in OKLCH color space, supporting both light and dark themes with Fredoka and Poppins font imports.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/RecipientView.tsx: Recipient-facing page that displays a birthday cake with candles, uses blow detection to extinguish candles via microphone input, and reveals the birthday message after successful blow detection.
frontend/src/pages/SenderForm.tsx: Form page for creating birthday greetings where users input recipient name and message, generates a unique UUID link, and displays the shareable link with confetti animation upon successful creation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom fonts (Poppins, Fredoka), container settings, border radius variables, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting a birthday greeting app with features for creating personalized wishes via shareable links, candle-blowing interaction, and festive UI design. Contains schema version, architectural notes, existing features with requirement IDs, and new feature requests.
